zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Pembrugge於1218年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾紐藍德時，他的父親Henry de Pembrugge26歲，母親Joan FitzWarin22歲。他於1272年4月27日與Elizabeth Gamage在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾維沙安結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1272年1月20日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾李享年54歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾艾維沙安。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Pembrugge was born in 1218, in Newland, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry de Pembrugge, was 26 and his mother, Joan FitzWarin, was 22. He married Elizabeth Gamage on 27 April 1272, in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 January 1272, in Leigh, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Evesham, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Pembrugge est né en 1218, à Newland, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Pembrugge, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan FitzWarin, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Gamage le 27 avril 1272, à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 janvier 1272, à Leigh, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Evesham, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Pembrugge 1218 in Newland, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Pembrugge 26 und seine Mutter Joan FitzWarin 22. Er hat am 27. April 1272 in Evesham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Gamage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Januar 1272 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Leigh, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Evesham, Worcestershire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Gamage il 27 aprile 1272, nel Evesham, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 gennaio 1272, nel Leigh, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Evesham, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Pembruggeが1218年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアニューランドで生まれた時，父Henry de Pembruggeは26歳，母Joan FitzWarinは22歳であった。1272年4月27日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムでElizabeth Gamageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1272年1月20日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアレイグで54歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエベシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Pembrugge(이)가 1218년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 뉴랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Pembrugge(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan FitzWarin(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1272년 4월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 에베샤에서 Elizabeth Gamage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 1월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 리에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 에베샤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Pembrugge nasceu em 1218, em Newland, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Pembrugge, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan FitzWarin, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Gamage em 27 de abril de 1272, em Evesham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Pembrugge родился в 1218 г. в местности нюланд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry de Pembrugge было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan FitzWarin, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Gamage 27 апреля 1272 г. в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 января 1272 г. в местности лиг, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности эвешам, ворсестиршир, Англия.
